And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form & Special Interrogatories & 2nd Document Demand & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
David J. Mattingly, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Christopher J. Hall
Adam S. Gruen, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Bennie J. Lewis

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Christopher Hall's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #2) is moot. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of any responses but notes that by filing untimely answers, all objections are waived. The Court finds that defendant failed to respond in a timely fashion thereby necessitating the filing of the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $690 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER S. HALL'S Motion To Recuse Adam Gruen, Esq. As Defense Counsel For Bennie Lewis.
APPEARANCE: David J. Mattingly, Esq. of Mattingly & Minnis LLP 551-0882 for pltf & moving party; Adam S. Gruen, Esq. of Law Offices of Adam S. Gruen 510/526-4949 opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN - SUBSTANTIAL RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE TWO PROCEEDINGS E.G. HALL AND GRUEN NEVER MET OR TALKED TO EACH OTHER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER, to comply with CRC 391. (302/REQ/AP) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
